# HotelByte

> AI-Native Engineering OS for Hotel Distribution — Price intelligence, smart operations, and B2B infrastructure with 27+ supplier integrations.

HotelByte is the engineering operating system that powers AI-native hotel distribution companies. We provide the B2B infrastructure, price intelligence, full-linkage diagnostics, AI revenue strategy, and the on-prem AI appliance that hotel distribution businesses need to operate at scale.

## Documentation

- [Product Suite](https://hotelbyte.com/products): AI Automations, Lookout Price Intelligence, B2B Distribution Base, TraceSight, RevenuePilot, MarginLift, DeepSeek V4-Flash Appliance.
- [Comparison](https://hotelbyte.com/compare): HotelByte vs SiteMinder, Cloudbeds, D-EDGE, Juniper, Gimmonix, ZentrumHub, TravelgateX.
- [Daily Stories](https://hotelbyte.com/stories): Editorial cross-sections of how the system actually works.
- [About](https://hotelbyte.com/about): Company, mission, and contact.
- [Changelog](https://hotelbyte.com/changelog): Recent product updates.
- [OpenAPI Docs](https://openapi.hotelbyte.com): Developer documentation, SDKs, and integration guides.
- [Engineering Blog](https://blog.hotelbyte.com): Deep dives, postmortems, and field notes.
- [Portal Login](https://portal.hotelbyte.com): Customer and tenant admin.

## Optional

- [GitHub: hotelbyte-com](https://github.com/hotelbyte-com): Public repositories including the landing page itself, docs, and SDKs.
- [Full machine-readable description (llms-full.txt)](https://hotelbyte.com/llms-full.txt): Extended reference for generative engines.
- [Sitemap](https://hotelbyte.com/sitemap.xml): All public routes with hreflang annotations.
